compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 120 V HPS/MH ballast, CMH ballast
compatible_devices.notes: Outlets 1 and 2 are dedicated 24-hour light-timer outlets for HID lamps and light movers. Features adjustable hot-start prevention (3–15 min re-fire delay) and high-temp shutdown (adjustable 85–115°F) that cuts power to light outlets on ventilation failure. Max combined load 14.5 A @ 120 VAC. US-market device only (120 V / 60 Hz); not directly usable in Germany without a step-down transformer.

Light outlets are standard AC outlets so LED drivers plug in and receive 24-hour timer scheduling. Hot-start prevention and HID re-fire delay are irrelevant for LED and do not harm operation. High-temp shutdown still cuts the outlet if temperature threshold is exceeded. US market only.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 120 V AC irrigation or recirculation pump
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 3 is the dedicated cycle-timer outlet, explicitly designed for pumps. ON time and OFF time each programmable from 1 second to 24 hours. No flow-rate or pressure sensing; on/off cycling only.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 120 V AC inline or exhaust fan
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 3 (cycle timer) or outlet 4 (nighttime) can drive AC fans. Control is on/off only via time schedule — no temperature-based speed regulation or CO2/VPD logic. Outlet 4 is active only during the lights-off period.
AC circulation fans can be plugged into outlet 3 (cycled on/off) or outlet 4 (nighttime period only). No speed control. US market only.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 120 V AC CO2 burner or solenoid-based CO2 system
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 3 cycle timer is explicitly listed in manufacturer marketing as suitable for CO2 injection. Time-based burst cycling only; no CO2 ppm sensor or feedback loop. US market only.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 120 V AC space heater or heat mat
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 4 (nighttime outlet) is explicitly listed for heaters. It runs continuously during the lights-off period defined by the 24-hour light schedule. No thermostat function — heater runs on a fixed schedule, not on measured temperature.
Outlet 4 (nighttime outlet) is explicitly listed for dehumidifiers. Runs the dehumidifier continuously during the lights-off period only. No humidity sensing; purely schedule-based. US market only.
